category_sources: source_facts.description says Symfony CLI builds, runs, and manages Symfony applications.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is symfony-cli and source_facts.repo is the official symfony-cli repository.
docs_sources: Official Symfony download/setup docs cover Symfony CLI; source_facts.repo README is also an official project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Symfony application management; source_facts.executables lists the symfony CLI.
